title: Seasonal Roadmap and other updates and fixes

texts: Added a button on reviews that lets you go to the reviewer's overall ranking.
Added a share button to builds, md plans, and collections. The default behavior uses the browser's share menu. This can be changed to simply copying the page link in Site Customization.
Reworked the dragging behavior for collections, fixing the issue where clicks didn't work. Changed the horizontally scrollable content on the homepage to use the same dragging behavior.
Added the roadmap to the Timers page and renamed it to Timers and Roadmap.
Reworked the layout for timers in the Timers page.
Disabled tooltips from popping up when tapping identities and E.G.Os on the Community Ranking page when using touch devices.
Disabled bumps from being clicked at all when the review is the current user's (the previous update disabled this but you could still click the button).

Fixed an issue where switching tabs could cause some data to reset while editing a build/md plan/collection. This could also cause a crash when editing an md plan using the spec build recommendation mode.
Updated a section of the Privacy Policy to what Google recommends. No actual changes to the content.
